top_patterns.description: Open with personal insight or experience, then invite or suggest action.
example_quotes: If traditional meditation has felt frustrating or hard to stick with, that’s okay. Walking meditation changed everything for me.
Healing doesn’t come from adding more tools or trying harder, it comes from creating space to listen honestly.

top_patterns.description: Statements affirming self-worth, often with a focus on enoughness.
example_quotes: You don’t need to earn your worth or explain your presence because simply being you has always been enough.
Success won’t make you feel enough. That has to come from within.

top_patterns.description: Reflections on personal or professional growth, often with lessons learned.
example_quotes: Many don’t know this about my mom…
The biggest problem in your business might be your biggest opportunity.

archetypal_structures.formula: I [personal insight], [call to action or reflection].
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Encourage self-acceptance and motivate reflection or change.
example_quotes: Success can look perfect on the outside and still feel empty on the inside. Healing begins the moment you stop running and realize you were always enough.
Sometimes feeling low is part of recalibrating, not breaking. With patience and the right support, the mind finds its way back to light.

archetypal_structures.formula: Quote (by someone else). I [personal experience or reflection].
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Connect universal wisdom to personal journey.
example_quotes: "In the midst of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer." - Albert Camus. Spent yesterday with one of the greatest living artists and storytellers, @petertunney.
Jim Carrey once described realizing that thoughts are not who we are, but something we can observe. That shift opens a feeling of freedom.

openers: Here’s what I wish I knew earlier
closers: That’s more powerful than any ad spend.
I’d love to hear from you.
Grateful for legends who become friends.
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences with occasional longer reflections.
language_habits.line_break_style: Often uses line breaks for emphasis, especially before key insights or calls to action.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Builds trust and relatability, invites engagement.
example_quotes: I chased every distraction I could find to feel better.
I’m 49. Here are five things I’d tell my 19-year-old self.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Fosters positive mindset, aligns with current themes of enoughness.
example_quotes: Healing begins when achievement stops being the answer.

anti_patterns: Overly generic motivational quotes without personal context
Long, complex sentences that reduce comment-readiness
Repetitive calls to action without variation

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current voice emphasizes authenticity, self-acceptance, and growth, with a conversational, encouraging tone.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift from more external achievements to internal worth and mindfulness themes.
